ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-29-2019 Off Calendar

Petition For Removal And Surcharge Of Administrator And For Accounting
Off Calendar Apr-25-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Nevin for and with Eurydice Tran.

The Court noted that Dino Castle is not present. Mr. Nevin stated that he has not heard from Mr. Castle, but they have done publication. The Court stated that it seems appropriate to remove Mr. Castle and appoint a Successor Administrator, that the order for removal does not include appointment of a Successor and questions whether that request was in the petition. The Court also informed Mr. Nevin that it can issue a surcharge for the amount sought out in the petition, but that it can not adjust it upward. Mr. Nevin is to provide a revised order with those provisions. The order is also to include a provision ordering Mr. Castle to turn over assets of the estate to the Administrator once appointed. The Court granted the Petition for Removal and Surcharge of Administrator, etc. (subject to receipt and review of the order). The Court also granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to receipt and review of the order). Bond in the amount of $20,000.00 is required. Status on close of estate is set for October 20, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-27-2018 Continued To Jan-08-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal And Surcharge Of Administrator And For Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-27-2018 Continued To Jan-08-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Nevin appeared by telephone for and with Eurydice Tran (present).

The Court informed Counsel that there is an issue of service on the Former Administrator, that a citation requires personal service, and noted that Counsel knew that the home where he served the Wife was not Mr. Castle's home and that substitute service is not sufficient. Mr. Nevin requested a four week continuance stating that he will file a petition to do service by publication. The Petition for Removal of Administrator, etc. and the Petition for Letters of Administration are continued to January 8, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to figure out how to get jurisdiction over the Former Administrator.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: F. Ruiz. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-29-2018 Continued To Nov-27-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel - Civil
Off Calendar Aug-31-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elizabeth Herp for Dino Castle.

The Court questions whether anyone is appearing for Ms. Tran. Ms. Herp stated that both petitions for removal of administrator and for letters of administration have been filed, that she is still requesting to be relieved as Counsel, that there has been no communication with her Client, that she has made numerous attempts to communicate with him and that the Wife also has not been able to reach him. Ms. Herp also stated that she does not think she has the correct address for Mr. Castle, that she is sending documents to the Wife's address, that the Wife is returning the mail as does not live here, that she has two phone numbers, that she is unable to leave messages as the message boxes are full, and that since March at the last contact, she had no indication that Mr. Castle would be dropping out. The hearing on the petition for letters of administration set for October 16, 2018 is continued to November 27, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to be heard with the petition for removal. The Court granted the Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel (subject to receipt and review of the order). Ms. Herp is to provide a revised order indicating future hearing dates. Status on filing of a petition to remove personal representative is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.
